title: Exporting board from free Monday to new company Monday?
excerpt: I had a free account in which I set up my dashboards the way I needed them. We just got a Pro account and I would like to export or copy over my boards into the company account so we don’t have to do the work twice. Is t…

posts.author: AdrianaSophia (Adriana Arce)
posts.cookedHtml: I had a free account in which I set up my dashboards the way I needed them. We just got a Pro account and I would like to export or copy over my boards into the company account so we don’t have to do the work twice. Is that possible?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Adriana! Sorry for the late reply here!

Yes, this is absolutely possible using the Cross-Account Copier feature in your admin section!

For step-by-step instructions, check out this article: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007913040-How-to-copy-boards-and-dashboards-between-accounts

If you need any help, send us a message at support@monday.com!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
